title: Simulator: Multi-gateway coordination model
description:
Add multi-gateway coordination to simulator.

## Changes

1. Simulated backbone network between gateways
2. Gateway discovery and slot negotiation
3. Node handoff simulation
4. Multi-gateway TDMA visualization

## Test scenarios

- 2 gateways, 500 nodes each, verify slot coordination
- Node mobility between gateway coverage areas
- Gateway failure and recovery
- Conflicting slot claims and resolution
